name: BRC Inc.
summary: BRC Inc. (BRCC) is a consumer products company focused on coffee, ready-to-drink (RTD) beverages, and energy drinks, with strong brand ties to the military, Veteran, and first-responder communities. The company sells through Direct-to-Consumer (DTC) and Wholesale channels, operates physical retail locations called Outposts, and offers merchandise. It relies on co-manufacturers and third-party suppliers for production and logistics.
